description: A single customer has placed multiple small orders that are all scheduled to ship on the same day. An agent needs to consolidate them into one shipment to save costs.

nodes.task_description: Identify all unshipped orders for a single customer with the same shipping date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds three separate orders for the same customer.

nodes.task_description: Merge the three orders into a single consolidated shipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully merges the orders in the warehouse management system.

nodes.task_description: Generate a single pick list and shipping label for the consolidated order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates one pick list and one shipping label for the entire shipment.
